MPs Publish Fans’ Charter For Live Music

Sunday, 19 April, 2026
Dame Caroline Dinenage, Member of Parliament for Gosport, has welcomed the publication of the findings of an independent fan-led review of the live music ecosystem set up by the Parliamentary Committee that she chairs. The review, which sets out nearly 50 recommendations under seven key principles, follows almost a year of engagement across the country with music fans and stakeholders, including a...
